name_en: 🆕 Chip Version💕Top-tier Original M12227 This Charms card holder is made of Monogram coated canvas and calfskin, making it a perfect gift. The card holder is adorned with two gold Monogram Blossom charms, and the exquisite design features five card slots, with two slots on the sides and one larger compartment in the middle.

10.2 x 7.3 x 0.3 cm (Length x Height x Width)
